title: What Knowledge Itself Actually Is
body:
Knowledge Itself is useful when you need a framing device that connects scattered facts into one bigger picture. It is less about memorising a canon and more about learning how to see a pattern clearly.

In Nexus terms, this is the kind of topic that helps you move across subjects without losing your footing. It gives you a way to ask better questions before you commit to deeper study.
keyPoints: Knowledge Itself is a cross-domain lens
It is strongest when paired with real examples
It helps orient curiosity before mastery
furtherReading: Trace the related subjects and signals inside Nexus
Compare how different disciplines describe the same issue
